description: Attribute-first layout primitives for app shells, boxes, containers, sections, headers, stacks, inline groups, clusters, split regions, sidebars, responsive grids, auto-grids, masonry, aspect ratios, spacers, pinned helpers, and form grouping.

data-layout.agent_hint: Selects the layout primitive. Use app-shell for full app frames, box for local sizing/padding, container for readable page width, section for page regions, header/split for title-actions rows, stack for vertical flow, cluster for wrapping actions, sidebar for nav plus content, grid/auto-grid/masonry for collections, aspect for media, spacer for rhythm, and field-group/form for forms.

data-size.agent_hint: Sets container width, section padding, or spacer height depending on layout.

data-align.agent_hint: Controls cross-axis alignment for flex-based layouts.

data-justify.agent_hint: Controls main-axis alignment for flex-based layouts.

data-cols.agent_hint: Sets responsive columns for grid and masonry layouts.

data-min.agent_hint: Sets the minimum column width for data-layout=auto-grid.

data-wrap.agent_hint: Allows inline layout children to wrap.

data-side.agent_hint: Controls which side contains the sidebar.

data-height.agent_hint: Sets minimum height for centered layouts.

data-stack.agent_hint: Stacks split, header, inline, or sidebar layouts at the selected breakpoint.

data-pin.agent_hint: Pins an element using absolute or fixed positioning. Pair with data-position.

data-hide.agent_hint: Hides an element at a breakpoint.

item.agent_hint: Layout child. Use semantic elements that match the content.

data-grow.agent_hint: Flex grow factor for the child.

data-shrink.agent_hint: Flex shrink factor for the child.

data-span.agent_hint: Grid column span for the child.

do: Use data-layout for page and component structure
Use data-gap, data-pad, and data-size for layout spacing instead of inline styles
Use semantic child elements such as header, main, aside, section, article, nav, form, and label
Use data-region only inside app-shell layouts
Use data-span, data-grow, data-shrink, and data-basis for item behavior
dont: Do not use layout-specific inline styles when a data attribute exists
Do not use data-layout for visual decoration beyond optional box surface, border, and radius helpers

examples.label: Box
examples.emmet: section[data-layout=box data-width=md data-pad=lg data-surface data-border data-radius]
examples.html: <section data-layout="box" data-width="md" data-pad="lg" data-surface data-border data-radius>Content</section>
